episodes.title: Interview With An Ex WMSCOG Member
episodes.description:
Today I am with Adam, Adam is a cult YouTuber and an Ex World Mission Society Church of God (WMSCOG) member. He is telling his story here in this first interview I did on my channel.

Recently had a conversation with him as well to tell my story as an Ex Jehovah's Witness: https://youtu.be/o33lr9JsBC8?si=gfOZD0InqpiYRTJ4

Your timestamps:

1:59 Introduction Adam (Finding The Alternative)

3:59  Being an EX WMSCOG member, what are their spiritual beliefs and their cult leaders like?

8:58  What is The Passover?

9:37  The Appeal of a Mother God

12:11  You were raised a Mormon, was religion important to you growing up?

16:18  High Control Tactics: I missed my dad’s last birthday by having to devote myself to the church

24:39  Letters from God the Mother
 
27:52  People visit the Mother God in Korea

29:21  My wife was in labor, I was not allowed to be there  

33:13  Doomsday/End of The World, what did the WMSCOG tell you about this?  

35:42  How do the WMSCOG see Hell?

41:52  144.000 people, the WMSCOG believe this as well

45:55  Did you ever think you were one of the 144.000?

47:02  They removed whole chapters of the books  
“You can only read redacted versions with a leader by your side”

48:55  WMSCOG’s volunteer work  

54:08  A beautiful lesson but rejected for donating blood

57:55  Donating to the church

1:00:32   Were you struggling financially due to the donations?

1:03:52  WMSCOG’s Arranged marriages  

1:06:57  “8/10 times you’ll see a Korean spouse to a leader”

1:08:29  Beginning of the end: Finding out about the WMSCOG’s past  
“I had to choose between my family & the church”

1:11:50  I didn’t spend all this time and money if I didn’t wanna believe.

1:14:31  I drove away from my wife & kids standing there

1:17:45  Shunning & Leaving

1:23:20  Last words from Adam for people in the WMSCOG and other cults

1:28:19  Thanks

Like, comment & subscribe is very much appreciated!
I am making videos about Ex JW after being raised in this religion and I hope I can make people feel less alone in their similar experience navigating back into the outside world after living in isolation.
subjects: World Mission Society Church of God

episodes.title: The Cult I Escaped Led Me Straight Into Another #exjw
episodes.description:
Today's video is about being raised in a cult and how easy it is to slip into another cult later on in life. Like I did...I am discussing several cults, the Jehovah's Witness and The Twin Flame community and some more information about cults.
I might make a new video some day soon about the most popular well known cults and what they do. 

0:00 Intro
0:31 I was raised a Jehovah's Witness
1:52 Disfellowship
2:57 How disfellowshipping is harmful for a person
4:05 Cults start with a spiritual idea 
4:37 Strange ideals and mind control
5:23 Bad things happen in secret
5:41 Cults target people looking for themselves
6:02 Spirituality is a good way to lure people in 
6:18 My New Age spirituality story
7:11 I started following spiritual groups
8:03 I joined The Twin Flame Lie 
8:27 What are Twin Flames?
9:53 Jeff and Shaleia: Twin Flame attention in the media
10:42 New Age spirituality isn’t that much about love
10:59 Dark Side of Twin Flames
11:26 Spirituality = Midlife Crisis practice?!
11:54 I’ve seen a very toxic Twin Flame relationship
12:46 “I AM the Second coming of Jesus”
13:53 I started walking my own path 
14:40 Looking for a divine partner 
14:58 Spiritual buzzwords
15:12 Cult leaders are isolating their followers
15:59 It’s not love, walk your own path
16:48 Other people hold a mirror for you
17:15 Countries abusing spirituality for personal gain
18:30 Conclusion
20:29 Ending credits
 
https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLYEvwdPbBrH0jykS4no7yPEL8Fp1fc9S0&si=PFumbHF4e_tzYFM7
I am making videos about Ex JW after being raised in this religion and I hope I can make people feel less alone in their similar experience navigating back into the outside world after living in isolation.
